message:
feat(tests): add comprehensive E2E test suites and RaptorQ extensions

RaptorQ:
- raptorq/builder.rs: Add RaptorQBuilder for configuring symbol size,
  source block count, repair ratio, and interleaving. Validation for
  parameter constraints. Tests for valid/invalid configurations.
- raptorq/pipeline.rs: Add RaptorQPipeline for streaming encode/decode
  with Cx cancellation. Pipeline stages: source block formation,
  encoding with repair symbols, and progressive decoding. Tests for
  roundtrip correctness and cancellation mid-stream.

E2E Tests:
- tests/e2e_actor.rs: Actor lifecycle tests — spawn, message passing,
  supervision restart, graceful shutdown, panic recovery, nested actor
  hierarchies, and mailbox overflow behavior.
- tests/e2e_combinator.rs: Stream/future combinator tests — map, filter,
  take, zip, merge, timeout, race, select, and error propagation through
  combinator chains.
- tests/e2e_console.rs: Runtime console/diagnostics tests — task listing,
  region tree display, obligation tracking, and health report generation.
- tests/e2e_redis.rs: Redis client integration tests — connection,
  GET/SET, MGET/MSET, pipelining, pub/sub, Lua scripting, key expiry,
  and error handling for connection loss.
- tests/e2e_websocket.rs: WebSocket E2E tests — client connect, text/
  binary message roundtrip, ping/pong, close handshake, fragmented
  messages, and concurrent read/write via split.
- tests/security.rs: Security property tests — TLS certificate pinning,
  authentication tag verification, symbol integrity, encrypted channel
  forward secrecy, and timing-safe comparison.

Updated E2E Tests:
- tests/http_e2e.rs: Expand with compression negotiation, chunked
  transfer, keep-alive, and HTTP/2 multiplexing tests.
- tests/e2e_fs.rs, grpc_e2e.rs, io_cancellation.rs, multi_protocol_e2e.rs,
  repro_spawn_panic.rs, runtime_e2e.rs, tls_conformance.rs: Refactor to
  use structured assertions (assert_with_log!), update test helper imports
  for test-internals feature, and improve error diagnostics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
